title: M5: Golden chain CFT verification (SC5)
description: Verify c=7/10 for AF golden chain via entanglement entropy or finite-size spectrum scaling. Dense Hamiltonian working, need CFT analysis.

title: M4: Fibonacci exact diag spectra (SC4)
description: Complete Fibonacci spectra for L=3..6 with both hopping and interaction. Compare with Poilblanc 2012 (Eq.20). Currently hopping-only spectra computed.

title: Implement f_matrix() and f_symbol()
description: Core F-symbol extraction: f_matrix(C, a, b, c, d) returns the F-matrix, f_symbol(C, a, b, c, d, e, f) returns a scalar. Handle QQBar to Float64 conversion.
close_reason: F-symbol engine implemented and tested: Fibonacci, sVec, Ising all pass

title: M2: sVec free fermion validation
description: Implement hopping matrix elements for sVec, build Hamiltonian, validate spectrum against free fermion E_k = -2t cos(pi*k/(L+1))
close_reason: sVec validated: 96 tests pass, spectrum matches free fermions to 1e-10 for L=2..8

title: Implement sVec hopping matrix elements
description: For sVec with F^{psi,psi,psi}_psi = -1, compute hopping matrix elements including Jordan-Wigner signs from F-symbol accumulation
close_reason: sVec validated: 96 tests pass, spectrum matches free fermions to 1e-10 for L=2..8

title: Explore TensorCategories.jl associator API
description: Figure out how to extract numerical F-matrices from associator() morphisms. Test with Fibonacci category.
close_reason: Explored API: six_j_symbols(C)[a,b,c,d] gives F-matrices directly, complex_embeddings for numerical conversion

title: M6: Pair creation/annihilation
description: Generalize Garjani-Ardonne pair creation to arbitrary FC via Mor(X_c, X_a ⊗ X_b). Variable-N Hamiltonian connecting different N-sectors.

title: Build and diagonalize sVec hopping Hamiltonian
description: H = -t sum_j (h_R + h_L), validate spectrum against free fermion tight-binding for L=2..8
close_reason: sVec validated: 96 tests pass, spectrum matches free fermions to 1e-10 for L=2..8

title: M3: General matrix element engine
description: F-symbol-based matrix elements for arbitrary 2-local operators. Needed for exchange, interaction beyond vacuum projector, and operations on non-dense chains.

title: Test F-symbols against known values
description: Verify: Fibonacci F^{tau,tau,tau}_tau = [[phi^-1, phi^-1/2],[phi^-1/2, -phi^-1]], sVec F^{psi,psi,psi}_psi = [-1], Ising F^{sigma,sigma,sigma}_sigma known. Pentagon equation check.
close_reason: F-symbol engine implemented and tested: Fibonacci, sVec, Ising all pass

title: M1: F-Symbol Engine
description: Extract numerical F-matrices from TensorCategories.jl associators. Foundation for all matrix element computations.
close_reason: M1 complete: fsymbols.jl with build_fsymbol_cache, f_matrix, f_symbol, fusion_channels

title: Systematic literature review: mobile anyons from fusion categories
description: Phase 1: API search (arXiv, Semantic Scholar) for core papers. Phase 2: Download PDFs, extract metadata, catalog. Phase 3: Google Scholar citation chase (who cites Poilblanc 2013, Garjani-Ardonne 2017, etc). Phase 4: Gap analysis against PRD. Source of truth = local PDF. All refs must string-match against source.
close_reason: Completed: 12 papers reviewed in detail, 4 citation chases done, 11 new papers discovered, catalog and review committed
